logs.heading: Logs
logs.description: Recent miner log entries, newest last. Auto-refreshes.
logs.disabled: File logging is disabled — enable it in Settings → Logger to view logs here.
now.discovery_slot_title: Filling a watch slot via directory discovery
pred.heading: Live Predictions
pred.empty: No active predictions right now. This board fills in automatically when a tracked streamer opens one.
pred.autobet_locked_title: Auto-bet is locked for this round only
grid.empty: No streamers tracked yet. Points will appear here as they are earned.
js.ov.enter_whole: Enter a whole number of points
js.ov.bet_failed: The bet could not be placed
js.ov.conn_lost_bet: Connection lost — the bet was not placed
card.channel_only_drop_title: This drop campaign only counts progress on this channel - it cannot be farmed by watching a different streamer
set.title: Settings
set.subtitle: Configure runtime settings. Changes take effect immediately.
set.streamers.title: Streamers
set.streamers.desc: Manage streamers to track. Drag to reorder. Click to expand per-streamer settings.
set.followed.title: Import followed channels
set.followed.desc: Pick channels you follow on Twitch to add to the tracked list. They are added with the default per-streamer settings. Already-tracked channels are disabled.
set.followed.empty: You don't follow any channels that aren't already tracked.
set.preferences.title: Channel Preferences
set.preferences.desc_pre: A read-only summary of each streamer's rotation preference, gathered in one place. Set a streamer's preference under
set.preferences.desc_post: ; the lists below refresh after you save.
set.defaults.title: Default Streamer Settings
set.defaults.desc: These settings apply to all streamers unless overridden individually.
set.priority.title: Priority Order
set.priority.desc: Drag to reorder. Higher priority items are checked first when selecting which stream to watch.
set.drops.title: Drops
set.drops.blacklist_desc: Keywords (one per line, or comma-separated). Any drop campaign whose drop or reward name contains one of these words (case-insensitive) is skipped during drop rotation prioritization — an additional exclusion on top of the already-claimed dedup.
set.directory.title: Directory Discovery
set.directory.desc_pre: Games for which the miner discovers live drops-enabled channels via the Twitch directory and farms the most-viewed one in an extra watch slot. This never touches the streamer list or its watch rotation. Use the exact game name as shown on Twitch (e.g.
set.directory.desc_post: ). Leave the list empty to keep discovery off.
set.directory.prefer_tracked_label: Prefer tracked streamers over discovered channels
set.directory.prefer_tracked_desc: When on, a directory-discovered channel never takes a watch slot away from one of your tracked streamers — discovery only fills otherwise-idle slots. When off, a discovered channel farming an active drop can displace a tracked streamer that is watched only for points or fair rotation.
set.directory.mode_desc: Which channels discovery may farm. "All channels" (default) picks the best drops-enabled channel from the Twitch directory, excluding your tracked streamers (the rotation covers those). "Tracked streamers only" restricts discovery to your own configured streamers, filling an idle slot with a tracked channel that has an active drop and isn't already being watched — never a random directory channel.
set.directory.prefer_subscribed_desc: When on, a discovered channel you are subscribed to is preferred over a non-subscribed one when choosing which candidate to farm — a tiebreaker layered over viewer count. Subscription is detected by proxy (an active channel-points multiplier, the same signal the SUBSCRIBED watch priority uses) via a slow periodic probe, so it may take a few minutes to take effect. No effect while the game list is empty.
set.ratelimits.title: Rate Limits
set.ratelimits.campaign_sync_desc: Minutes between full drop campaign syncs (5-120)
set.ratelimits.drop_progress_desc: Minutes between lightweight drop-progress refreshes shown on the Drops page (1-60)
set.ratelimits.minute_watched_desc: Base seconds between minute watched cycles (30-120, divided by # of streamers)
set.ratelimits.conn_timeout_desc: Minutes without any successful API or PubSub activity before the dashboard shows "connection lost" (5-60)
set.ratelimits.rotation_min_desc: Minimum minutes the watch pair dwells before rotating, when more than 2 tracked streamers are online (5-180)
set.ratelimits.rotation_max_desc: Maximum minutes the watch pair dwells before rotating; a random value in [Min, Max] is drawn on every rotation (5-240)
set.logger.title: Logger
set.logger.console_desc: Minimum log level shown in console
set.logger.file_desc: Minimum log level saved to file
set.logger.colored_desc: ANSI colors for container stdout, Portainer, and Dozzle. Does not affect colors or emojis on the built-in Logs page.
set.analytics.title: Analytics
set.analytics.days_desc: Number of days to show in charts
set.discord.title: Discord Integration
set.discord.desc: Configure Discord notifications. You'll need to create a Discord bot and add it to your server.
set.discord.enable_desc: Turn on Discord integration (requires restart after enabling)
set.discord.token_desc: Your Discord bot token (keep this secret!)
set.discord.howto_bot: How to create a Discord bot:
set.discord.howto_guild: How to find your Guild (Server) ID:
set.discord.s7: Copy the generated URL and open it to add the bot to your server
js.set.form.follow_raid.desc: Follow when streamer raids another channel
js.set.form.max_contribution_percent.des: Max % of current balance to contribute to a goal at once (0 = no limit). Applies only when Community Goals is enabled.
js.set.form.max_contribution_amount.desc: Absolute point cap per contribution (0 = no limit). The lower of this and Max Contribution % is used. Applies only when Community Goals is enabled.
js.set.form.rotation_preference.desc: Prefer: favored when picking who to watch. Avoid: never watched unless it's the only online channel. Neither overrides DROPS/STREAK priority or fair rotation.
js.set.form.stealth_mode.desc: Bet slightly less than top predictor
js.set.streamer.use_custom: Use custom settings for this streamer
js.set.confirm.reset: Reset all settings to defaults? This will NOT remove streamers.
drops.title: Drops
drops.subtitle: Twitch Drop campaigns — current, upcoming, and past. Feasibility badges are an estimate from current data, not a guaranteed drop.
drops.policy.label: Campaign policy
drops.policy.hint: GAME_ORDER keeps the configured game order (default).
drops.discovered.heading: Discovered Channels
drops.discovered.subtitle: Live drops-enabled channels found in the Twitch directory for your configured games. The most-viewed available channel is farmed in an extra watch slot, separate from the streamer rotation; it switches automatically when a channel goes offline or its drops end.
drops.upcoming.subtitle: Campaigns Twitch has announced that have not started yet. Read-only — the miner never farms a campaign before its official start.
drops.past.subtitle: Campaigns that have ended, from the miner's own catalog (Twitch stops listing expired campaigns). Recurring campaigns are grouped; expand a card for each instance.
drops.list.empty: No active drop campaigns right now. Campaigns appear here once the miner syncs them from Twitch.
drops.badge.channel_only_title: This drop campaign only counts progress on a specific channel - it cannot be farmed by watching a different streamer
drops.badge.upcoming_title: This campaign has not started yet; the miner never farms it before its official start
drops.modal.no_drops: No individual drops to show for this campaign.
drops.rule.heading: Per-drop rules
drops.rule.no_effect: (no effect — Twitch didn't report this flag)
drops.past.empty: No past campaigns recorded yet. Campaigns are catalogued as the miner observes them, and appear here once they end.
drops.discovery.off_pre: Directory discovery is off. Add games under
drops.discovery.off_post: to automatically farm drops from the most-viewed live channel of each game.
drops.discovery.none_pre: No live drops-enabled channels found right now for
notif.title: Notifications
notif.channels.title: Discord Channels
notif.channels.desc: Select which Discord channel each notification type should be sent to.
notif.ch.system.desc: Channel for reauthorization-required and connection-lost/restored alerts
notif.system.title: System Alerts
notif.system.desc: Get notified when Twitch authorization expires or the miner loses connectivity for an extended period.
notif.mentions.title: Chat Mentions
notif.mentions.desc: Get notified when someone mentions you in chat.
notif.mentions.enable.desc: Receive notifications when mentioned in chat
notif.mentions.all_chats.desc: Notify for mentions in all tracked streams
notif.mentions.selected.desc: Only notify for mentions in these chats
notif.points.title: Point Goals
notif.points.desc: Get notified when you reach a point threshold in a channel.
notif.stream.title: Stream Status
notif.stream.desc: Get notified when streamers go online or offline.
notif.stream.online_enable.desc: Receive notifications when streamers go live
notif.stream.offline_enable.desc: Receive notifications when streamers go offline
js.notif.invalid_rule: Please enter a valid streamer and threshold
stat.title: Statistics
stat.subtitle: Channel-points balance over time, annotated with key events (bet win/loss, watch streak, raids).
stat.stale: Data may be stale — the last refresh failed.
stat.empty.title: No data
stat.empty.desc: There are no points-history records yet for the selected streamer and period.
stat.error.title: Failed to load
stat.truncated: A downsampled selection is shown. Full data — via “Export JSON”.
stat.roi.title: Betting ROI (predictions)
stat.roi.subtitle: Analytics for automatic and manual prediction bets: return, win rate, drawdown, breakdown by streamer, strategy and odds. Read-only — strategies are not changed or disabled.
stat.roi.empty.title: No bets
stat.roi.empty.desc: There are no settled prediction bets yet for the selected period and filters.
stat.roi.wins_note: Win rate, average wager and “wagered” are computed over settled bets (win+loss); refunds return the stake and are excluded.
stat.kpi.note: Balance change includes spending and bets; accrued counts only positive gains — the two may differ.
stat.partial: Partial data: the selection hit the backend row limit, so the breakdown and “Accrued” are hidden for this period.
stat.breakdown.title: Earnings breakdown
stat.breakdown.subtitle: Where the points came from over the selected period: passive watching, bonus claims, raids, and watch streaks.
js.stat.chart_lib_failed: Failed to load the charting library.
health.disclaimer: The canary confirms Twitch accepts the watch transport and beacon requests. Without an active drop campaign it does not prove accrual of a specific drop.
health.title: Health Center
health.subtitle: Operational health signals and the watch-transport accrual canary. Auto-refreshes every 15 seconds.
health.unavailable: Health monitoring is not available yet.
health.canary.title: Watch-transport canary
health.canary.run_hint: Set a channel to enable "Run canary now".
health.watchdog.title: Drop-progress watchdog
health.watchdog.enable: Enable stall detection and automatic recovery
health.watchdog.explain: A stall is confirmed only when every gate holds at once: the channel is really being watched, watch reports are delivered, inventory checks complete without progress, and Twitch itself is not degraded. Recovery runs one bounded, cooldown-limited stage at a time and never loops.
streamer.rewards_desc: Redeem this streamer's custom channel-point rewards manually, or let the miner auto-redeem selected rewards within a points budget. Rewards that require a typed message can only be redeemed manually.
streamer.auto.title: Automatic redemption
streamer.auto.desc: When enabled, the miner automatically redeems the rewards you check Auto above — but only while they're available and only up to the total budget below. Rewards requiring a typed message are never auto-redeemed. The budget counts total points spent this run and resets on restart or when you change these settings.
js.streamer.no_search_results: No messages found for your search
js.streamer.rewards_load_failed: Could not load rewards. This streamer may not be tracked, or has no custom rewards.
js.streamer.no_rewards: No custom rewards found for this channel.
js.streamer.manual_only_title: Rewards requiring text can only be redeemed manually
js.streamer.msg_required: This reward requires a message before redeeming.
js.streamer.budget_required: Set a budget above 0 to enable auto-redeem.
js.streamer.reward_required: Check at least one reward to auto-redeem.
